name: Daltonized Dark
author: Claude Themes Community
description: Colorblind-safe dark theme built on the daltonized base, using the Okabe-Ito / IBM accessible palette (blue + orange + yellow) so success/warning/error stay distinguishable for deuteranopia and protanopia. Full token derivation gives a non-white user-input highlight (addresses Claude Code a11y issues #34702 and #8504).
